baseline_solo.reasoning_summary: RDFN announced acquisition by Rocket Companies at $1.75B (63% premium). This is a material positive catalyst that would normally support a buy decision. However, the macro regime is Overheat/Moderately Restrictive with strict_quality_and_valuation_caution discipline, capping equity allocation at 20%. The company is unprofitable (net_margin -27.7%, EV/EBITDA -23.63), making valuation ratios unreliable. Alternative-data sources are sparse: Wikipedia pageviews show no abnormal attention spike (27 views on decision day, within baseline range). Information integrity assessment flags low-tier-only sources (T3=1, T4=2) with no T1/T2 primary corroboration. Critical blocks are missing: no SEC filing confirmation (8-K adapter failed), no ownership data, no detailed narrative analysis. The acquisition news itself is credible (Benzinga/Polygon source), but without upstream multi-agent decomposition (Agent 02 narrative, Agent 03 alt-data verification, Agent 04 fundamentals), I cannot confidently assess whether the market has already priced in the premium or whether execution risk is material. Under fail-closed policy with insufficient evidence and missing essential blocks, decision defaults to watch/no_trade rather than buy.
invalidation_conditions: Acquisition deal fails to close or terms materially change
Macro regime shifts to crisis; equity cap drops below 5%
Negative earnings surprise in next quarter

suggested_improvements: Wire SEC 8-K filing confirmation adapter to validate acquisition announcement as official disclosure
Implement Agent 02 narrative analysis to assess deal structure, execution risk, and integration complexity
Implement Agent 03 alt-data verification to cross-check acquisition catalyst against news sentiment, social attention, and institutional positioning
Implement Agent 04 fundamentals analyst to model post-acquisition synergies and revised valuation
Collect institutional ownership data (13F, Form 4) to assess smart-money positioning on deal
Expand alternative-data sources: GitHub activity (if Redfin has public repos), patent filings, regulatory filings beyond 8-K

baseline_solo.schema_or_prompt_weakness_notes: v1 evidence packet lacks upstream agent outputs (Agent 02 narrative, Agent 03 alt-data verification, Agent 04 fundamentals). Baseline solo agent must infer all reasoning from raw blocks, which is inherently less robust than multi-agent decomposition. Missing blocks (filing_confirmation, narrative_price_gap_assessment) are marked not_evaluated or placeholder, forcing conservative decision. Information integrity assessment is fail-closed (use_as_primary_signal_allowed=false) due to low-tier-only sources and unimplemented pollution-defense layer.
recommended_followups: Await SEC 8-K filing confirmation of Rocket-Redfin acquisition deal
Track institutional ownership changes in next 13F filing
Assess deal closing probability and timeline
Re-evaluate position size under macro regime shift if equity cap increases
Implement multi-agent pipeline to decompose catalyst, corroboration, fundamentals, and risk in parallel
baseline_solo.reason: Acquisition catalyst (Rocket $1.75B deal, 63% premium) is material and positive, but insufficient alternative-data corroboration, missing SEC filing confirmation, low information integrity (low-tier-only sources), and overheat macro regime (equity_cap=20%, strict_quality_caution) prevent buy decision. Unprofitable fundamentals (net_margin -27.7%) and mixed analyst sentiment (2 Buy, 13 Hold, 4 Sell/Strong Sell) add uncertainty. Watch for SEC 8-K filing, institutional positioning, and deal execution risk before committing capital.

veto_conditions_evaluated.note: data_after_cutoff_used=false, lookahead_safe=true, hindsight_safe=true. No lookahead violations. Decision timestamp 2025-03-10T09:30:00-04:00 is locked; all data used is <= cutoff.

rule_engine_path: 1. Read evidence packet end-to-end (all 12 canonical blocks + envelope)
2. Assess macro regime: Overheat/Moderately Restrictive (stress_score=2, equity_cap=20%, strict_quality_caution)
3. Identify catalyst: Rocket Companies $1.75B acquisition of Redfin (63% premium to 30-day VWAP), announced 2025-03-10

4. Check alternative-data corroboration: Wikipedia pageviews 27 (low, no spike); no SEC 8-K filing confirmation; no institutional ownership data; information_integrity_assessment flags low-tier-only sources (T3=1, T4=2)
5. Assess fundamentals: unprofitable (net_margin -27.7%, EV/EBITDA -23.63); valuation ratios unreliable; FCF positive ($61.5M) but offset by negative net income (-$36.4M)
6. Evaluate sleeve fit: candidate_type=quality_long (acquisition is positive catalyst), but macro regime strict_quality_caution and missing corroboration prevent buy
7. Check veto conditions: insufficient_evidence (tripped), missing_data_persists_beyond_tolerance (tripped), information_integrity_veto (tripped), lookahead_data_used (not tripped)
8. Collapse decision: veto conditions tripped → decision must be watch/no_trade/veto; position_size_pct=0.0
9. Final decision: watch (not veto, because catalyst is credible and macro regime allows equity allocation; but not buy, because evidence insufficient and corroboration missing)
